calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Cavalry Portfolio Services, LLC.

No appearance by defendant Joel Ceron.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $6,170.48
Prejudgment interest @ the rate of 7% from 09-16-10.
Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice And Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted
Off Calendar Apr-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC'S Notice And Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted.
Granted, no opposition filed.
Sanctions awarded in the amount of $240.00. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not Reported (301/PJB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Set For Trial On May-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
